title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Union Bank of India

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Union Bank of India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Union Bank of India! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Union Bank of India:
Union Bank of India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Union Bank of India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
